title: grants — HTTP routes
description: Two route groups. Tenant serves the admin CRUD + enumeration + bulk endpoints. Platform-admin serves read-only cross-tenant search + the compliance audit-report generator.

groups.description: Tenant grant CRUD + enumeration. Grants.warm_grant_cache middleware pre-loads the caller's grant footprint into L1 so subsequent policy checks are cache-hits.

routes.name: tenant.grants.index
routes.description: List grants. Default filter: WHERE subject_id = auth_user.id (a user sees their own grants). Admins with `grants.manage` can pass filter[subject_id] to widen. Filters: filter[decision], filter[resource_type], filter[source], filter[active_only], filter[granted_by], filter[expiring_before].

routes.name: tenant.grants.store
routes.description: Body: `subject_id, resource_type, resource_id, permissions[], decision?, expires_at?, reason`. Delegates to GrantIssuer::issue() with source='manual', granted_by = auth_user. All six invariants fire — cross-tenant / privilege-escalation / permission-unknown / past-dated / etc. Response 201 on success.

routes.name: tenant.grants.update
routes.description: Body may include ONLY `expires_at` + `reason` + `metadata`. Every other field is immutable post-issue. 422 on immutable field mutation attempt.

routes.name: tenant.grants.revoke
routes.description: Body: `reason` (required, 20+ chars). Delegates to GrantRevoker::revoke() — sets revoked_at + revoked_by + revoked_reason atomically. Refused when grant is already terminal (revoked / expired).

routes.name: tenant.grants.by-subject
routes.description: Enumerate every grant this principal holds. Requires the caller to be the subject themselves OR to hold `grants.audit_any` (admin+).

routes.name: tenant.grants.by-resource
routes.description: Enumerate every grant on a specific resource. Requires the caller to own the resource OR hold `grants.audit_any`. Sorted denies-first then created_at desc so the inviolable blocks surface at the top.

routes.name: tenant.grants.bulk
routes.description: Upload a CSV of grants. Body: multipart/form-data `csv` field. Enforced by `bulk_grant_provision` entitlement (medium+ plan). Dispatches BulkGrantIssueJob and returns 202 Accepted with the batch id. Poll `GET /api/v1/grants/bulk/{batch_id}` for status.

routes.name: tenant.grants.target-types
routes.description: List every registered `resource_type` (from GrantableRegistry) with display label + optional target_picker_screen_ref. Consumed by the share-access dialog to build the resource-type Select.

routes.name: tenant.grants.preflight
routes.returns: { ok: boolean, warnings: array<string>, blockers: array<string> }
routes.description: Debounced client-side validation endpoint. Runs the six-invariant guards WITHOUT inserting, so the share-access dialog can surface 'Bob already holds this permission via his role; grant is redundant' or 'You don't hold invoice.edit; you cannot grant it' before submit.

groups.description: Cross-tenant read + audit-report generation for Stackra compliance ops.

routes.name: platform.grants.index
routes.description: Cross-tenant grant search for support + audit. Every read is captured in audit context (SOC 2 CC6.1).

routes.name: platform.grants.audit-report
routes.returns: { report_id: string, expires_at: datetime, download_url: string }
routes.description: Generate a cross-tenant compliance snapshot. Body: `since, until, tenant_ids?, resource_types?, format` (csv | json). Signed download URL valid for 24h. Enforced by `grant_audit_report` entitlement (enterprise + compliance module co-active).
